afterSnapshot.name: ROUTE_PRESSURE_LOW_HPA
afterSnapshot.description: Mean sea-level pressure (hPa) at or below which a leg is flagged for a nearby low-pressure system.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Low absolute pressure indicates an active weather system worth warning about.
implementation: 1005 hPa matches the app's existing low-pressure annotation threshold for consistency.
